_instructions: Add 2-3 bullet points of your real experience per topic family. These are injected into article generation as grounding context. First person. Specific. Include failure modes you've seen.
concurrency: Migrated a high-traffic URLSession-heavy networking layer to async/await — the main gotcha was cancellation semantics differing from the old callback pattern
Hit data races in shared cache objects when moving to Swift 6 strict concurrency — had to actor-isolate more than expected
Saw background task starvation on A13 devices under memory pressure when using Task.detached without QoS
swiftui_rendering: Profiled a feed view that re-rendered 3x per scroll tick — root cause was @Observable object held by multiple ancestor views
Found Instruments' SwiftUI template misleading on simulator — always profile on device
